title: Korbond CORE Mix Polyester Thread Selection by Korbond-12 x 32m spools – 10 Colours – 384 metres – Hand and Machine Sewing, Repairs, Crafting
description: From the manufacturer LARGE PACK Korbond Thread Set contains 12 spools of expert threads in 10 different colours! The great value set contains a total of 384m of thread! RANGE OF COLOURS Korbond Thread Packs contain 12 spools of 10 colours, giving you a wide selection meaning you always have the perfect thread for your project. HAND AND MACHINE SEWING The professional standard bobbins are ideal for both hand and machine sewing, so no matter if you are a beginner or expert crafter, this set is ideal. SEWING KIT ESSENTIAL Every sewing kit needs a good supply of threads to match any fabric you may need to work with. Korbond Thread Packs and a quick way to build up your thread collection ensuring you're prepared for any project.
